case_title: 1560 SACRAMENTO, LLC VS. BRET KITTLE et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF JURY FEE AND EXPENSES PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO DEFENDANT KITTLE, BRET

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON MAR-05-2014 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT BRET KITTLE'S WAIVER OF ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIED THE APPLICATION AS TO WAIVER OF JURY FEES & EXPENSES. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: CYNTHIA M. LEE; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF 1560 SACRAMENTO, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KITTLE, BRET THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1560 SACRAMENTO STREET, #206, SAN FRANCISCO CALIFORNIA $14,952.33 RENT, $2,400.00 ATTORNEY FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $17,352.33, SEE SCANNED DOC
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT KITTLE, BRET
DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT KITTLE, BRET

MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON MARCH-05-2014 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT BRET KITTLE'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: CYNTHIA M. LEE; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
